symbols: small stone church on a hilltop — the enduring presence of faith in rural communities
cross atop the bell tower — Christ's lordship proclaimed over the landscape
description: A photograph of a small medieval stone church on a green hillside. The building is constructed of rough-cut fieldstone with a steep roof covered in wooden shingles or slate. A wooden bell tower or belfry with a small cross rises from the roof. The church has small Gothic-arched windows and a side porch or entrance. A large tree stands nearby. The setting is rural Norwegian countryside with gentle green hills and an overcast sky.
